title: Devara: Part 1
tmdbOverview: Devara, a fearless man from a coastal region, embarks on a perilous journey into the treacherous world of the sea to safeguard the lives of his people. Unbeknownst to him, his brother Bhaira is plotting a conspiracy against him. As events unfold, Devara passes on his legacy to his mild-mannered and timid son, Varada.
synopsis: Devara: Part 1 (2024) is a action and drama film from India. It carries a 6.0 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
